payload.last_assistant_message:

The branch `feat-19-add-countdown-variant-merch-badge` has no committed implementation yet. There's nothing to commit at this point.

If you've implemented the countdown variant changes, make sure to `git add` the relevant source files first (e.g., the badge component and any modified JS files), then run `/commit` again.
